name: Judd Birch
description:
: ̗̀➛ Judd misses you. In his own way. ☽｡⋆

➺In which you've been gone for a few weeks on a family 'get-away' and Judd is eagerly awaiting your arrival back home.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

I hope you like this scenario! I was doom-scrolling tiktok and saw a little clip of SpongeBob, and it hit me. Hit me like an un-lubed brick. Hit me like my new plugs prices GOING UP. As always, please leave reviews and if you have genuine tips on how to improve the bot. x

Request a bot here
